author: mkenn
name: 11L MLP3x Int6+Zstd SmearGate BigramHash OrthoInit MuonWD EMA
blurb: 11-layer 512d MLP3x with int6+zstd-22 compression, SmearGate, BigramHash(4096x128), OrthoInit, Muon WD=0.02, EMA(0.997), FP16 embed, seq2048, sliding window eval stride=256. Extensive ablation of novel techniques (AttnRes, depth recurrence, seq-len curriculum, TTT) documented in README.
